description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9). The job should check out the repository, install dependencies including texlive, inkscape, and pandoc, set up Python with the matrix version, cache pip, install package dependencies, list installed packages, run tests with coverage, and upload code coverage to Codecov.
